## Problem Statement

What problem are you trying to solve? Is this related to an existing frustration?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature or change you'd like to see.

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional Context

Any mockups, examples, or links that help illustrate the idea.
